name: CRDTree

unions.name: CRDTree
unions.comment:
Opaque type representing a Replicated Tree,
to build see [int](#init).

unions.name: Error
unions.comment: Represents the failure to apply an operation

values.name: add
values.comment:
Add a node after tree cursor, the cursor is set
at the added node path.

    init { id = 1, maxReplicas = 4 }
      |> add "a"
      |> Result.andThen (add "b")
      |> Result.andThen (add "c")
values.type: a -> CRDTree.CRDTree a -> Result.Result (CRDTree.Error a) (CRDTree.CRDTree a)

values.name: addAfter
values.comment:
Add a node after another node at given path,
the cursor is set at the added node path.

    init { id = 1, maxReplicas = 1 }
      |> add "a"
      |> Result.andThen (add "b")
      |> Result.andThen (addAfter [1] "c")
    -- node with value "c" is inserted between nodes "a" and "b"
values.type: List.List Basics.Int -> a -> CRDTree.CRDTree a -> Result.Result (CRDTree.Error a) (CRDTree.CRDTree a)

values.name: addBranch
values.comment:
Add a branch after tree cursor, subsequent
additions are added to the branch.

    init { id = 1, maxReplicas = 4 }
      |> addBranch "a"
      |> Result.andThen (add "a,b")
      |> Result.andThen (add "a,c")
values.type: a -> CRDTree.CRDTree a -> Result.Result (CRDTree.Error a) (CRDTree.CRDTree a)

values.name: apply
values.comment:
Apply a remote operation

    treeA : CRDTree String
    treeA =
      let
          tree =
            init { id = 1, maxReplicas = 2 }
      in
      tree
        |> batch [ add "a", add "b", add "c" ]
        |> Result.withDefault tree

    operation : Operation String
    operation =
      lastOperation treeA

    treeB : CRDTree String
    treeB =
      let
          tree =
            init { id = 1, maxReplicas = 2 }
      in
      tree
        |> apply operation
        |> Result.withDefault tree

    (root treeA) == (root treeB)
    (operations treeA) == (operations treeB)
    (path treeA) /= (path treeB)
    (timestamp treeA) /= (timestamp treeB)
values.type: CRDTree.Operation.Operation a -> CRDTree.CRDTree a -> Result.Result (CRDTree.Error a) (CRDTree.CRDTree a)

values.name: batch
values.type: List.List (CRDTree.CRDTree a -> Result.Result (CRDTree.Error a) (CRDTree.CRDTree a)) -> CRDTree.CRDTree a -> Result.Result (CRDTree.Error a) (CRDTree.CRDTree a)

values.name: cursor
values.comment:
Return the tree cursor

    treeA : CRDTree String
    treeA =
      let
          tree =
            init { id = 1, maxReplicas = 1 }
      in
      tree
        |> batch [ add "a", add "b", add "c" ]
        |> Result.withDefault tree

    (cursor treeA) == [3]


    treeB : CRDTree String
    treeB =
      let
          tree =
            init { id = 1, maxReplicas = 1 }
      in
      tree
        |> batch [ addBranch "a", addBranch "b" ]
        |> Result.withDefault tree

    (cursor treeB) == [1, 2, 0]

values.name: delete
values.comment:
Mark a node at a path as deleted.

    init { id = 1, maxReplicas = 4 }
      |> batch [ add "a", add "b" ]
      |> Result.andThen (\tree -> delete (cursor tree) tree)

Nodes are not actually deleted but marked and their children
discarded.
values.type: List.List Basics.Int -> CRDTree.CRDTree a -> Result.Result (CRDTree.Error a) (CRDTree.CRDTree a)

values.name: get
values.comment:
Get a value at path

    treeA : CRDTree String
    treeA =
      let
          tree =
            init { id = 1, maxReplicas = 1 }
      in
      tree
        |> batch [ addBranch "a", addBranch "b", add "c" ]
        |> Result.withDefault tree

    (get [1] treeA) == (Just (Node.init "a" [1]))
    (get [1, 2] treeA) == (Just (Node.init "b" [1,2]))
    (get [1, 2, 3] treeA) == (Just (Node.init "c" [1, 2, 3]))
    (get [4] treeA) == Nothing
values.type: List.List Basics.Int -> CRDTree.CRDTree a -> Maybe.Maybe (CRDTree.Node.Node a)

values.name: getValue
values.comment:
Get a value at path

    treeA : CRDTree String
    treeA =
      let
          tree =
            init { id = 1, maxReplicas = 1 }
      in
      tree
        |> batch [ addBranch "a", addBranch "b", add "c" ]
        |> Result.withDefault tree

    (get [1] treeA) == (Just "a")
    (get [1, 2] treeA) == (Just "b")
    (get [1, 2, 3] treeA) == (Just "c")
    (get [4] treeA) == Nothing
values.type: List.List Basics.Int -> CRDTree.CRDTree a -> Maybe.Maybe a

values.name: id
values.comment: The local replica id

values.name: init
values.comment:
Build a CRDTree

    tree : CRDTree String
    tree = init { id = 1, maxReplicas = 1024 }

`id` for this replica, not two replicas can have the same id. To
ensure this, it shuld be assigned by a server.

`maxReplicas` maximum number of possible replicas, this value has
to be assigned to generate unique timestamps.
values.type: { id : Basics.Int, maxReplicas : Basics.Int } -> CRDTree.CRDTree a

values.name: lastOperation
values.comment:
Return the last successfully applied operation or batch
or if operation was not succesfull an empty batch.

      import Operation exposing (Operation(..))

      -- success
      init { id = 1, maxReplicas = 1 }
        |> batch [ add "a", add "b", add "c" ]
        |> Result.map (\tree ->
             (lastOperation tree) /= Batch [])

      -- failure
      init { id = 1, maxReplicas = 1 }
        |> delete [1,2,3]
        |> Result.map (\tree ->
            (lastOperation tree) == Batch [])

values.name: moveCursorUp
values.comment:
Move the tree cursor one level up

    treeA : CRDTree String
    treeA =
      let
          tree =
            init { id = 1, maxReplicas = 1 }
      in
      tree
        |> batch [ addBranch "a", addBranch "b", add "c" ]
        |> Result.withDefault tree

    (cursor treeA) == [1, 2, 3]
    (cursor (moveCursorUp treeA)) == [1, 2]

values.name: operationsSince
values.comment:
Return a list of operations after a known timestamp

    treeA : CRDTree String
    treeA =
      let
          tree =
            init { id = 1, maxReplicas = 2 }
      in
      tree
        |> batch [ add "a", add "b" ]
        |> Result.withDefault tree

    (List.length (operationsSince 0 treeA)) == 2
    (List.length (operationsSince 2 treeA)) == 2
    (List.length (operationsSince 4 treeA)) == 1

    -- 1, 3 are not known timestamps, since the
    -- logic clock increment depends on `maxReplicas`
    (List.length (operationsSince 1 treeA)) == 0
    (List.length (operationsSince 3 treeA)) == 0

values.name: root
values.comment: Root node of the CRDTree

name: CRDTree.Json

values.name: operationDecoder
values.comment: Decoder for an operation

values.name: operationEncoder
values.comment:
Encoder for an operation, expects a function that takes
anything and returns a value

name: CRDTree.Node

unions.name: Node
unions.comment:
Node can be either a branch or leaf `Node` with optional
data or a `Tombstone` representing a removed Node

values.name: children
values.comment: Return a list of a nodes' children

values.name: descendant
values.comment: Return a Node at a path
values.type: List.List Basics.Int -> CRDTree.Node.Node a -> Maybe.Maybe (CRDTree.Node.Node a)

values.name: init
values.comment:
Build a node

    timestamp (init 'a' [0, 1]) == 1
    path (init 'a' [0, 1]) == [0, 1]
    value (init 'a' [0, 1]) == Just 'a'

values.name: isDeleted
values.comment: Return `True` if the node has been deleted

values.name: path
values.comment:
Return the path of a node

    path (node (Just 'a') [0, 1]) == [0, 1]

values.name: root
values.comment:
Build a root node

    timestamp root == 0
    path root == []
    value root == Nothing

values.name: timestamp
values.comment:
Return the timestamp of a node

    timestamp (node 'a' [0, 1]) == 1

values.name: tombstone
values.comment:
Build a tombstone providing timestamp and path

    timestamp (tombstone [0, 1]) == 1
    path (tombstone [0, 1]) == [0, 1]
    value (tombstone [0, 1]) == Nothing

values.name: updateChildren
values.comment: Update a Node's children
values.type: List.List (CRDTree.Node.Node a) -> CRDTree.Node.Node a -> CRDTree.Node.Node a

values.name: value
values.comment:
Return the value of a node

    value (node 'a' [0, 1]) == Just 'a'
    value (tombstone [0, 1]) == Nothing

name: CRDTree.Operation

values.name: merge
values.comment: Merge two operations
values.type: CRDTree.Operation.Operation a -> CRDTree.Operation.Operation a -> CRDTree.Operation.Operation a

values.name: path
values.comment: Operation path

values.name: replicaId
values.comment: Id of the replica originating the operation

values.name: since
values.comment: Return operations since a timestamp

values.name: timestamp
values.comment: Timestamp of the operation

values.name: toList
values.comment: List of operations
